_description: Inventory alias map consumed by scripts/reconcile_inventory.py + scripts/check-inventory-freshness.py. SETUP --generate materialises this file with project-specific values during Phase D (Discovery).

_schema.bc_alias: dict[bounded_context_dir → short_alias]. Each BC's inventory ID prefix (e.g. 'auth', 'org').
_schema.bc_feature: dict[bounded_context_dir → list[feature_id]]. Default feature ownership per BC.
_schema.cross_bc_features: dict[file_path → list[feature_id]]. Path-level overrides for files whose feature ownership is NOT the default for their BC.
_schema.canonical_path_globs: list[glob]. Repo-relative globs scanned for orphan detection. Each match must have an inventory entry.
